data.title: Refactor Directory section into Faculty directory page

data.body: Refactor the existing Directory section (grid of page links on the home page) into a Faculty directory — a dedicated page/section showcasing the people (leaders/faculty) of Fractal. The current Directory component at src/components/sections/Directory.tsx is a simple link grid; this task replaces it with a people-focused directory.

## Design Templates

**Single badge (individual card design):**
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - avatar badge single.png

**Directory grid layout (full page):**
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - avatar badge directory.png

Badge design: tall vertical photo card with pinned-photo frame, corner details, name overlaid at bottom in serif, role/description text below. Directory is a 3x3 responsive grid of these badges on cream background. Uses PEOPLE data from src/data/houses.ts. FRAC-44 (avatar badge component) is a dependency — build the badge first, then compose into the directory.

FRAC-44 merged into this task. Full scope: build the avatar badge component (pinned-photo card with name/role overlay) AND compose them into the People directory page using a responsive grid layout. References from both tasks apply here.

Implementation complete. Created AvatarBadge (tall 2:3 photo card with initials fallback, corner pins, gradient overlay) and PeopleDirectory (responsive grid section). Updated PeoplePage and Home. Typecheck passes. Branch: frac-40-people-directory, commit 4a6c0a3.

REVIEW PASS. Reviewed diff cold against plan and PRD.

What was reviewed:
- AvatarBadge.tsx: New component with 2:3 aspect ratio, object-cover photo, 4 corner pin dots, gradient overlay with serif name + role, initials fallback with house color, hover scale transition. Clean implementation.
- PeopleDirectory.tsx: Section header matches HouseBannerGrid pattern exactly. Grid is mobile-first (grid-cols-2 base, sm:grid-cols-3). FadeIn with staggered delays (0.08s increments).
- PeoplePage.tsx: Replaced Coming soon with PeopleDirectory component.
- Home.tsx: Swapped Directory import/usage for PeopleDirectory.
- houses.ts: Added optional bio field to Person interface.

Acceptance criteria:
1. AvatarBadge renders tall vertical card with frame and overlay — PASS
2. PeopleDirectory shows responsive grid from PEOPLE data — PASS
3. /people route shows full directory — PASS
4. Home page shows PeopleDirectory where Directory was — PASS
5. Mobile 2-col grid — PASS (grid-cols-2 default)
6. Tablet 3-col grid — PASS (sm:grid-cols-3)
7. Initials fallback — PASS (getInitials + house color, gray fallback for empty houses)
8. FadeIn stagger — PASS (index * 0.08 delay)
9. No regressions — PASS (typecheck clean, no broken imports)

PRD alignment: Matches Person Directory spec. Mobile-first respected. Consistent with site architecture.

Minor notes (non-blocking):
- Old Directory.tsx is orphaned dead code (not deleted, but not imported anywhere). Cleanup can happen in a separate task.
- bio field added to Person interface but not rendered in AvatarBadge — this is preparatory per the plan, not a gap.

Verdict: PASS.
